gate_06_routing.observed: Model: mid (budget: 4000 tokens) — default (insufficient history for this operation type)
gate_06_routing.expected: routingSource='default' with 'insufficient history' message on first sessions
gate_06_routing.notes: Correctly falls back to static defaults. 'rename' operation_type resolved (answered '2' for crud but answer sequencing missed — gate consumed it as contract text)

after_per_assertion_validation.notes: after.ts ran without crash. Per-assertion prompts did not fire because no assertions were written (answer sequencing issue — Gate 05 got the operation type answer '2' instead of assertions). Gate 06 then consumed multi-line text as the type answer and defaulted to 'rename'. The assertions array was empty so after.ts fell through to the decision/danger zone/contract prompts. No crash.

crashes.notes: No crashes in before or after. Both commands completed cleanly.

bugs_identified.description: Answer sequencing in validation script consumed Gate 05 assertion slot with operation type answer. This is a validation script issue, not a before.ts bug — the sequential ask pattern differs from real interactive use.
bugs_identified.action: No fix needed in before.ts; validation script ordering was incorrect

bugs_identified.description: after.ts receives Gate 05 assertion answers out of sync when sequential answers miss Gate 05. After records a decision + danger zone instead of per-assertion results.
bugs_identified.action: No change needed — this is expected behaviour when no contract assertions are present
